title: Question: Related to BLKANDNBLK error while linting

features.name: struct type imported from external package
features.description: Code should include a struct type definition in a package that is imported into a module where the struct variable is declared and used

features.name: blocking assignment via assign to struct member
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment (assign) to a struct member where the struct type is defined in an external package

features.name: non-blocking assignment in always_ff to struct member
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a struct member inside an always_ff block, where the struct type is imported from an external package

features.name: mixed blocking and non-blocking assignments to different struct members
features.description: Code should include blocking assignment via assign and non-blocking assignment in always_ff to different members of the same struct variable, triggering BLKANDNBLK error incorrectly when struct is from external package
